flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (13.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeastern Technical College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (32.6% → 39.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southeastern Technical College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (57.1% → 68.6%).
